title: Dark Brown Rectangular Hamper Kit - 30cm x 45cm (1 Set) - Including Wood Wool & Ribbon Bow - Perfect for Gifting and Special Occasions
features: RECTANGULAR DARK BROWN DESIGN: The complete dark brown rectangular hamper kit features a stunning rectangular dark brown finish, enhancing your gifting experience and leaving a lasting impression on your loved ones during special occasions.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Each hamper is crafted from high-quality, durable materials, ensuring a long-lasting and sturdy container that safeguards your gifts while showcasing an exquisite appearance.

LONG-LASTING USE: Designed with durability in mind, this complete rectangular hamper kit not only guarantees a spectacular presentation but also provides long-lasting use, making it a valuable and reusable keepsake for years to come.

PERFECT FOR GIFTING & SPECIAL OCCASIONS: Whether you're preparing Valentine's Day surprises or assembling a thoughtful Christmas bundle, this versatile hamper kit is ideal for making any occasion extra special, complete with wood wool and ribbon bow for a delightful finishing touch.

CONVENIENT & VERSATILE: Measuring 30cm x 45cm, the complete dark brown rectangular hamper kit offers ample space for various gift items, allowing you to effortlessly create a customizable, elegant, and personalized gift hamper for any celebration.
description: Our Make Your Own Rectangular Hamper Kit is easy to use, fun and makes the perfect gift for a loved one that loves crafting.
